problem_statement: Two workers running the same revision and replay fixture disagree on whether a feature gate is active. Find the causal family and avoid blaming code without isolation.

observations.statement: Worker A and worker B report the same revision and input fingerprint, but A accepts and B rejects the fixture.
The only material environment difference is CHILI_EXPERIMENTAL_GATE=1 on A and 0 on B; resolved settings snapshots confirm the values.
Toggling only that setting in isolated processes swaps the outcomes while revision, fixture, dependency versions, and clock remain fixed.
